title: CLI Agent: report.system.disk
description: Disk partition usage metrics collected by the Honeybadger CLI agent. One event per non-pseudo partition per reporting interval.

host.description: Hostname of the machine running the agent.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp set by the CLI agent at collection time.

mountpoint.description: Mount point of the partition, e.g. "/" or "/data".

used_percent.description: Usage as a percentage (0.0–100.0), rounded to 2 decimal places.
